title: Uniform & Stationery
metaDescription: Find Rosehill College uniform and stationery information for Years 9 to 13. Stationery can be purchased online, and uniforms are available at The Uniform Shoppe Papakura.

blocks.text: Uniform & Stationery Rosehill College Uniform ‍Students will not be able to wear their sports hoodies and or sports uniform to school; this can only be worn when participating in their codes and or practices. ‍ New Students All new students to Rosehill College will purchase the new uniform. All students will be in the same bottoms Unisex navy long pants and/or shorts Navy Skirt - Short and long are available There should be no Tartan Skirts Please note: No BLACK pants or shorts to be worn ‍ Year 12 and Year 13 Rosehill College White Shirts with embroidered sleeves and school crest. Available in a mens and a womens cut Blazer (Optional, except for student leaders) School tie (Optional, except for student leaders) ‍ Year 9 to Year 11 Students Blue shirts with embroidered sleeves and school crest. Available in a mens and a womens cut. ‍ House Shirts - Compulsory ‍House shirts are to be worn for all House activities, fun days and sports events within school.House shirts are also used for Physical Education as their uniform for practical classes. ‍ Shoes ‍‍All Black lace up shoes Black Roman sandals Black Burgan Stocks Uniform Shop Rosehill College uniform can be purchased from SAS or order online by selecting this link. 28a Wood Street, Papakura Phone 09 296 6063 Shop Hours Monday - Thursday: 8.30am – 5.00pmSaturday : 9.00am – 1.00pmFriday & Sunday : Closed Stationery List 2026 Stationery is not sold by the school. You are welcome to purchase stationery from OfficeMax or any outside supplier such as Warehouse Stationery or a local high street chain. Year 9 Stationery List Year 10 Stationery List Year 11 Stationery List Year 12 Stationery List Year 13 Stationery List
‍Students will not be able to wear their sports hoodies and or sports uniform to school; this can only be worn when participating in their codes and or practices.
All new students to Rosehill College will purchase the new uniform.
All students will be in the same bottoms
Unisex navy long pants and/or shorts
Navy Skirt - Short and long are available
There should be no Tartan Skirts
Please note: No BLACK pants or shorts to be worn
Rosehill College White Shirts with embroidered sleeves and school crest. Available in a mens and a womens cut
School tie (Optional, except for student leaders)
Blue shirts with embroidered sleeves and school crest. Available in a mens and a womens cut.
‍House shirts are to be worn for all House activities, fun days and sports events within school.House shirts are also used for Physical Education as their uniform for practical classes.
Rosehill College uniform can be purchased from SAS or order online by selecting this link.
Stationery is not sold by the school. You are welcome to purchase stationery from OfficeMax or any outside supplier such as Warehouse Stationery or a local high street chain.
